overview: Healing Family Functional Medicine provides comprehensive functional medicine care to men, women, and children. Dr. Patel incorporates lifestyle strategies, nutritional counseling, hormone balancing, gut healing treatments, and detoxification into personalized management plans.
highlights: Comprehensive laboratory testing including microbiome and hormone analysis
Group health programs combining functional medicine with holistic therapy and mind-body skills training
Specialties in preconception, pediatric care, and post-COVID recovery
targetAudience: Families and individuals of all ages seeking functional medicine for chronic conditions, hormonal health, mental health, and health optimization.
